title: ponaea cernua
intro: Ponaea cernua, also known as the New Zealand native Ponaea, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ponaea cernua include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Ponaea cernua can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
